definition.name: NXhzdr_target
definition.doc:
HZDR laser-target campaign profile (NXhzdr_target).
Certifies the canonical entry of a DAMNIT NeXus bridge file against the NXhzdr_target profile. Since profile 0.6 the definition covers the whole semantic layer the writer emits, not just the target group: the /entry/sample target map (standard NXsample fields plus HZDR profile extensions), the /entry/sample/environment chamber-vacuum group (NXenvironment), the /entry/instrument/laser NXsource with its nested NXbeam and per-shot NXdata series, per-diagnostic and per-product-kind NXdetector groups, and the campaign start_time/end_time entry fields. All content groups and fields are optional because the writer skips absent/null metadata keys entirely (profile doc section 2); the profile marker attributes damnit_nx_class and damnit_nxdl_version are required whenever the sample group exists.
The open extras bag is modelled as the partial-name attribute prop_KEY (free-form keys, string or number values). The flat transport tables of the bridge file (/entry/shots, /entry/source_events, /entry/data_products, per-source payload collections) are DAMNIT-internal NXcollection groups and are intentionally not modelled here.

field.name: definition
field.doc: NXDL schema to which this file conforms.

field.name: start_time
field.doc: Campaign start: earliest shot fired_at (standard NXentry field, written since profile 0.6; refreshed on rebuild while carrying the damnit_source="shots" marker attribute).

attribute.name: damnit_source
attribute.doc: Marks a campaign bound maintained by the DAMNIT writer from shot fired_at values. The fixed value is "shots"; the attribute is optional so externally authored NXentry bounds remain valid.

field.name: end_time
field.doc: Campaign end: latest shot fired_at (standard NXentry field, written since profile 0.6; refreshed on rebuild while carrying the damnit_source="shots" marker attribute).

attribute.name: damnit_source
attribute.doc: Marks a campaign bound maintained by the DAMNIT writer from shot fired_at values. The fixed value is "shots"; the attribute is optional so externally authored NXentry bounds remain valid.

group.name: instrument
group.doc: Instrument-side semantic groups (nexus-semantic-maps.md sections 2 and 4): the campaign laser source and per-diagnostic / per-product-kind detector groups. Optional as a whole - a campaign without laser or diagnostic metadata has no instrument group.

group.name: laser
group.doc: Campaign-level laser snapshot from the first shot's metadata.laser.* block (nexus-semantic-maps.md section 2). The nested beam group is a documented deviation from the more common sibling placement: the beam is grouped with its originating source (nxhzdr-target-profile.md section 5).

field.name: type
field.doc: Constant "Laser" (standard NXsource field).

field.name: probe
field.doc: Constant "visible light" (standard NXsource field and enum value).

field.name: name
field.doc: Laser system label; source key metadata.laser.system.

field.name: frequency
field.doc: Repetition rate; canonical unit Hz; source key metadata.laser.repetition_rate.

field.name: pulse_energy
field.doc: Pulse energy; canonical unit J; source key metadata.laser.pulse_energy.

field.name: incident_energy
field.doc: Pulse energy on target; canonical unit J; source key metadata.laser.pulse_energy.

field.name: pulse_duration
field.doc: Pulse duration; canonical unit fs; source key metadata.laser.pulse_duration.

field.name: incident_wavelength
field.doc: Central wavelength; canonical unit nm; source key metadata.laser.wavelength.

field.name: incident_polarization
field.doc: Polarization label (string enum, registry key laser.polarization).

field.name: beam_position_x
field.doc: Beam position x; canonical unit mm; source key metadata.laser.beam_pos_x.

field.name: beam_position_y
field.doc: Beam position y; canonical unit mm; source key metadata.laser.beam_pos_y.

field.name: extent_x
field.doc: Beam waist x; canonical unit um; source key metadata.laser.beam_waist_x.

field.name: extent_y
field.doc: Beam waist y; canonical unit um; source key metadata.laser.beam_waist_y.

field.name: contrast_ratio
field.doc: Temporal contrast ratio (dimensionless); source key metadata.laser.contrast_ratio (HZDR profile extension - no standard NXbeam field).

group.name: shot_series

group.doc: One group per metadata.diagnostic.* scalar (shot-indexed data series, damnit_source="metadata.diagnostic") or per data-product kind (row references back to /entry/data_products, damnit_source="data_products"); nexus-semantic-maps.md section 4. Group names are the diagnostic key / detector_<kind>, so the match here is by class, not name.

attribute.name: damnit_source
attribute.doc: Writer ownership marker. Diagnostic series use "metadata.diagnostic"; per-product reference groups use "data_products".

attribute.name: coordinates
attribute.doc: Diagnostic-series coordinate path, fixed to /entry/shots/shot_index when present.

group.name: sample
group.doc: Target metadata for the campaign (profile doc section 2). Written once per campaign file from the first shot's metadata.target.

attribute.name: damnit_nx_class
attribute.doc: Marks the group as following the NXhzdr_target profile while the group keeps NX_class="NXsample" for compatibility (profile doc section 3; decision closed 2026-07-18 - the compatibility value is permanent).

attribute.name: damnit_nxdl_version
attribute.doc: Profile version the writer conformed to. Must match HZDR_TARGET_PROFILE_VERSION and the profile document version.

attribute.name: target_ref
attribute.doc: URL or stable id of the MediaWiki target record.

attribute.name: gas_species
attribute.doc: Gas-jet / cluster species (e.g. Ar, N2, He).

attribute.name: prop_KEY
attribute.doc: Open extras bag: one attribute per metadata.target.properties key, value as given (profile doc section 3; target-ontology.md section 4). Keys are free-form, so only the prop_ prefix is fixed here; values are not unit-registry-backed.

field.name: name
field.doc: Descriptive name of the target (standard NXsample field).

field.name: type
field.doc: Target class per the binding target ontology (target-ontology.md section 3). Standard NXsample field name, but the value vocabulary is the HZDR laser-target enumeration, not the upstream NXsample sample/can/buffer list (profile doc section 2, since v0.5). Wiki catalog types are mapped onto this enum by the reconciler with the original text preserved in the prop_wiki_type attribute.

field.name: material
field.doc: Target material as recorded, free text (HZDR profile extension - no standard NXsample field; source key metadata.target.material). Real values are often trade names ("Formvar"), layer lists ("Si, Cu") or gas mixtures, not chemical formulas (profile doc section 2, since v0.4).

field.name: chemical_formula
field.doc: Target material as a CIF/Hill-notation formula (standard NXsample field). Since profile 0.4 the writer derives it from metadata.target.material only when the value parses as a plain element-symbol formula (e.g. Au, Si3N4); otherwise the field is absent and only the free-text material dataset is written.

field.name: thickness
field.doc: Target thickness; canonical unit nm (standard NXsample field).

field.name: temperature
field.doc: Sample temperature; canonical unit degree Celsius, written as the registry string "degC" since profile 0.3 (standard NXsample field).

field.name: diameter
field.doc: Target diameter; canonical unit mm (HZDR profile extension - no standard NXsample field).

field.name: gas_pressure
field.doc: Gas-jet backing pressure; canonical unit bar (HZDR profile extension - no standard NXsample field).

field.name: substrate_material
field.doc: Substrate material for coated/layered targets (HZDR profile extension - no standard NXsample field).

field.name: description
field.doc: Free-text notes (standard NXsample field; source key metadata.target.notes).

group.name: environment
group.doc: Target-chamber vacuum from metadata.vacuum.* (registry namespace vacuum.*; nexus-semantic-maps.md section 3). Placed under the sample group because the chamber vacuum describes the sample surroundings. Covered by the application definition since profile 0.6.

field.name: description
field.doc: Constant "target chamber vacuum".

field.name: chamber_pressure
field.doc: Chamber pressure at shot time; canonical unit mbar; source key metadata.vacuum.chamber_pressure.

field.name: pre_shot_pressure
field.doc: Pressure immediately before the shot; canonical unit mbar; source key metadata.vacuum.pre_shot_pressure.

field.name: rga_dominant_species
field.doc: Dominant residual-gas species reported by the RGA (string; registry key vacuum.rga_dominant_species).
